summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO/SSR metadata system for The HoneyGroove vinyl social platform. All 11 backend tests passed. Bot detection middleware verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All SSR endpoints properly generate HTML with OG tags, Twitter Cards, canonical URLs, and JSON-LD structured data
✅ Listing SSR includes vinyl:artist, vinyl:album, vinyl:variant, product:price, trade:available metadata
✅ Profile SSR includes collector:username, collector:collection_size, ProfilePage JSON-LD schema
✅ Collection SSR includes top artists and CollectionPage JSON-LD
✅ ISO SSR includes ItemList JSON-LD with numberOfItems
✅ Honeypot/Marketplace SSR shows dynamic active listing count (5 records)
✅ Bot detection middleware correctly intercepts Twitterbot/Discordbot and serves SSR HTML
✅ Normal users (Chrome UA) receive React SPA index.html
test_credentials: No auth required for SSR endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data (listing: 9010e90e-3f90-4eff-8e41-b3fd39283d6d, user: katieintheafterglow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO/SSR system fully tested and working. SSR endpoints at /api/ssr/* serve pre-rendered HTML for bots. Bot middleware in craco.config.js intercepts requests from known bots and proxies to backend SSR. Test listing 9010e90e-3f90-4eff-8e41-b3fd39283d6d (Taylor Swift - Lover, For Trade) and user katieintheafterglow are valid test data.
